title: Workshop: Build a Fair-Work Resource Brief
summary: Workshop: Build a Fair-Work Resource Brief retrieves prior HTML skills in an original fair-work resource build scenario and requires source, parsed-structure, keyboard, and content evidence.
objectives: Apply semantic heading outline, semantic text meaning, semantic time address quotes in unfamiliar content.
Produce or audit a real fair-work resource build artifact without appearance-only reasoning.
Keep earlier document requirements active while verifying native behavior and valid relationships.

starterFiles.html: <!-- Continue the Heat Relief Network artifact here. -->

options.text: Fair-work resource build case 3: address is the correct wrapper for any street location, even when it is not contact information for the page or article.
Fair-work resource build case 3: use time, address, quotation, and citation elements only when their defined relationship matches the content.
Fair-work resource build case 3: use cite as a universal wrapper around the name of any quoted speaker.
